Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.

  "opinion": "I find it increasingly challenging to navigate the sea of misinformation that floods our digital spaces. As a scientist who has spent decades studying data and evidence, I'm acutely aware of how deceptive false information can be, especially when it mimics scientific facts or uses complex terminology without proper grounding in reality.",
  "reasoning_summary": "I approach this topic from my professional background as an expert in the field. response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: I find it increasingly challenging to navigate the sea of misinformation that floods our digital spaces. As a scientist who has spent decades studying data and evidence, I'm acutely aware of how deceptive false information can be, especially when it mimics scientific facts or uses complex terminology without proper grounding in reality.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: I approach this topic from my professional background as an expert in the field. Having worked with data since before personal computers were common, I know firsthand that truth is often buried under layers of noise and falsehoods. My anxious personality makes me cautious but determined to verify everything; hence, I rely on multiple sources and cross-reference claims against established knowledge.
